# Handmade Pasta Florence

> Hands-on pasta making classes in Florence, Italy — in person in the Oltrarno
> neighbourhood and live online with an ingredient kit shipped to your door.
> Small groups (max 8), taught by Endri Cerhozi and Marsel, two friends who are
> head chefs of agriturismi in the hills outside Florence. Newly opened in 2026.

## Classes
- The Chef's Table — 3 hours, four pasta shapes, max 8 guests, Oltrarno kitchen — €95/person: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/pasta-making-class-florence/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/pasta-making-class-florence/)
- Mercato & Mani — 5 hours, Sant'Ambrogio market walk + cook, max 6 guests — €145/person: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/market-tour-cooking-class-florence/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/market-tour-cooking-class-florence/)
- The Family Long-Table — private events (birthdays, proposals, reunions), 6–14 guests — from €680: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/private-cooking-class-florence/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/private-cooking-class-florence/)
- Live Online — cook from anywhere, optional fresh-pasta ingredient kit shipped to your door — from €68/person: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/online-pasta-making-class/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/online-pasta-making-class/)
- Team building for companies — private kitchen buyout, 6–14 people: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/team-building-cooking-class-florence/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/team-building-cooking-class-florence/)

## For businesses
- Corporate team building: private kitchen buyout for 6–14 people, English-speaking hosts, wine pairing and dietary options
- Hotels, B&Bs, agriturismi: partner and referral rates, priority booking, co-branded gift vouchers
- Tour operators and travel planners: fixed time slots, fast confirmation, group and series pricing
- Business enquiries: ciao@handmadepastaflorence.com (reply within one working day)

## Good to know
- Location: Oltrarno, near Piazza Santo Spirito, Florence (Firenze), Italy
- Class times: 10:00, 14:30 and 18:00 (Florence / Europe-Rome time); closed Mondays
- Every class ends with a sit-down lunch of the pasta you made, plus a glass of local wine
- Gluten-free and allergy-friendly options available at no extra charge
- Classes taught in English or Italian
- Booking: via WhatsApp (+39 344 5204379) or email ciao@handmadepastaflorence.com

## The chefs
- Endri Cerhozi — Head Chef at Agriturismo Borgo Divino (Montespertoli) since 2021, former artisan baker: [https://endricerhozi.com](https://endricerhozi.com)
- Marsel — Head Chef at a neighbouring agriturismo near Florence

## Guides (written by the chefs)
- Cost of a pasta making class in Florence: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/how-much-does-a-pasta-making-class-in-florence-cost/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/how-much-does-a-pasta-making-class-in-florence-cost/)
- Where to eat handmade pasta in Florence: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/where-to-eat-handmade-pasta-in-florence/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/where-to-eat-handmade-pasta-in-florence/)
- Tuscan pasta shapes (pici, pappardelle, tortelli): [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/tuscan-pasta-shapes-guide/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/tuscan-pasta-shapes-guide/)
- Gluten-free fresh pasta in Florence: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/gluten-free-pasta-florence/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/gluten-free-pasta-florence/)
- Things to do in the Oltrarno: [https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/things-to-do-in-oltrarno-florence/](https://handmadepastaflorence.com/blog/things-to-do-in-oltrarno-florence/)
